enonce.texte:
Read the sentences below. Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

1. I _______ watching action films. They are exciting.

2. She _______ listening to pop music because it is fun.

3. He _______ eating vegetables. He prefers meat.

4. They _______ playing video games. They think it's boring.

5. My friend _______ reading books. She reads every day.

questions.texte: Choose the correct expression to complete each sentence.
questions.reponse:
1. love / like
2. likes / loves
3. doesn't like / hates
4. don't like / hate
5. likes / loves

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 1 with a verb expressing strong positive feeling.
sousQuestions.reponse: I love watching action films. They are exciting.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 2 with a verb expressing positive feeling.
sousQuestions.reponse: She likes listening to pop music because it is fun.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 3 with a verb expressing negative feeling.
sousQuestions.reponse: He doesn't like eating vegetables. He prefers meat.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 4 with a verb expressing strong negative feeling.
sousQuestions.reponse: They hate playing video games. They think it's boring.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 5 with a verb expressing positive feeling.
sousQuestions.reponse: My friend likes reading books. She reads every day.

enonce.texte: Rearrange the words to form correct sentences expressing likes, dislikes, or preferences.

questions.texte: Rearrange the words to form correct sentences.
questions.reponse:
1. I like pop music because it is interesting.
2. He doesn't like watching horror films.
3. They prefer comedy films to action films.
4. We love listening to music in the evening.
5. She hates waking up early in the morning.

sousQuestions.texte: like / pop music / because / it / interesting / is / I
sousQuestions.reponse: I like pop music because it is interesting.

sousQuestions.texte: doesn't / He / horror films / watching / like
sousQuestions.reponse: He doesn't like watching horror films.

sousQuestions.texte: comedy films / prefer / action films / They / to
sousQuestions.reponse: They prefer comedy films to action films.

sousQuestions.texte: listening / love / music / in / We / the evening / to
sousQuestions.reponse: We love listening to music in the evening.

sousQuestions.texte: hates / early / She / up / in / waking / the morning
sousQuestions.reponse: She hates waking up early in the morning.

enonce.texte: Read the following statements about entertainment preferences. Give a reason for each preference using 'because'.

questions.texte: Complete the sentences with a reason.

sousQuestions.texte: I like pop music because...
sousQuestions.reponse: I like pop music because it is catchy and fun.

sousQuestions.texte: He loves watching action films because...
sousQuestions.reponse: He loves watching action films because they are exciting.

sousQuestions.texte: She doesn't like horror films because...
sousQuestions.reponse: She doesn't like horror films because they are scary.

sousQuestions.texte: They hate listening to loud music because...
sousQuestions.reponse: They hate listening to loud music because it gives them a headache.

sousQuestions.texte: We prefer watching comedy films because...
sousQuestions.reponse: We prefer watching comedy films because they make us laugh.

enonce.texte:
Read the text about Marie's entertainment preferences and answer the questions.

My name is Marie. I love listening to music, especially Afrobeat and pop. My favourite singer is Davido. I also like watching films. I prefer comedy films to action films because comedies make me laugh. I don't like horror films; they are too scary. I hate watching news on television because it is boring. In my free time, I like singing and dancing with my friends.

questions.texte: Answer the following questions based on the text.
questions.reponse:
1. Marie loves listening to music, especially Afrobeat and pop.
2. She prefers comedy films to action films.
3. She doesn't like horror films because they are too scary.
4. She hates watching news on television because it is boring.
5. She likes singing and dancing with her friends.

sousQuestions.texte: What type of music does Marie love?
sousQuestions.reponse: Marie loves listening to music, especially Afrobeat and pop.

sousQuestions.texte: What kind of films does Marie prefer?
sousQuestions.reponse: She prefers comedy films to action films.

sousQuestions.texte: Why doesn't Marie like horror films?
sousQuestions.reponse: She doesn't like horror films because they are too scary.

sousQuestions.texte: What does Marie hate watching? Why?
sousQuestions.reponse: She hates watching news on television because it is boring.

sousQuestions.texte: What does Marie like doing in her free time?
sousQuestions.reponse: She likes singing and dancing with her friends.

enonce.texte:
Write a short commentary about your entertainment preferences. Include:

  • What type of music you like/dislike and why
  • What type of films you prefer and why
  • What you like to do in your free time

Write at least 5 sentences.

questions.texte: Write a short commentary about your entertainment preferences.
questions.reponse: A well-written paragraph of at least 5 sentences expressing likes, dislikes, and preferences with reasons.

sousQuestions.texte: Use expressions like 'I like', 'I love', 'I don't like', 'I hate', 'I prefer' in your writing.
sousQuestions.reponse: Student uses appropriate expressions to convey preferences.

sousQuestions.texte: Give reasons for your preferences using 'because'.
sousQuestions.reponse: Student provides logical reasons for their preferences.

enonce.texte:
Read the dialogue between two friends, Amina and Paul, about their entertainment preferences.

Amina: Hi Paul! What kind of music do you like?

Paul: I love Afrobeat! It's so energetic and makes me want to dance. I don't really like country music because it's too slow for me.

Amina: I agree! I also love Afrobeat. And what about films?

Paul: I prefer action films. I think they are very exciting and full of adventure. I hate romantic films because they are boring.

Amina: Really? I love romantic films! I think they are beautiful and touching. I don't like action films because they are too violent.

Paul: That's interesting! We have very different tastes.

questions.texte: Analyze the dialogue and answer the questions.
questions.reponse:
1. Paul loves Afrobeat.
2. Paul doesn't like country music because it's too slow.
3. Paul prefers action films because they are exciting.
4. Amina loves romantic films because they are beautiful and touching.
5. Amina doesn't like action films because they are too violent.
6. Accept any logical answer.

sousQuestions.texte: What type of music does Paul love?
sousQuestions.reponse: Paul loves Afrobeat.

sousQuestions.texte: Why doesn't Paul like country music?
sousQuestions.reponse: Paul doesn't like country music because it's too slow for him.

sousQuestions.texte: What kind of films does Paul prefer? Why?
sousQuestions.reponse: Paul prefers action films because they are exciting and full of adventure.

sousQuestions.texte: What type of films does Amina love? Why?
sousQuestions.reponse: Amina loves romantic films because she thinks they are beautiful and touching.

sousQuestions.texte: Why doesn't Amina like action films?
sousQuestions.reponse: Amina doesn't like action films because they are too violent.

sousQuestions.texte: Do you agree with Paul or Amina? Explain why.
sousQuestions.reponse: Accept any logical answer explaining the student's preference.

enonce.texte:
Create a short dialogue between two friends talking about their entertainment preferences. Include:

  • At least 6 exchanges (3 per person)
  • Expressions of likes, dislikes, and preferences
  • Reasons for their preferences using 'because'
  • At least one question and answer

questions.texte: Write a dialogue between two friends about their entertainment preferences.
questions.reponse: A well-structured dialogue with at least 6 exchanges, using appropriate expressions and reasons.

sousQuestions.texte: Use expressions like 'I like', 'I love', 'I don't like', 'I hate', 'I prefer' in the dialogue.
sousQuestions.reponse: Student correctly uses expressions of preference.

sousQuestions.texte: Include at least two different entertainment topics (music, films, TV shows, games, etc.).
sousQuestions.reponse: Student discusses at least two different entertainment topics.
